title: Useless Foods
description: Adding Useless Food To The Game
body:
Useless Foods That Don't Need To Be In The Game Like Chicken Nuggets, Sandwiches, Rice, And More To Come! This Mod Is To Show That More Food Would Be Convienent, It Is't Always Beter. The Objective of this mod is to add foods that won't be added.

**No Mod Bugs Or Issues Known Yet, If Any Are Found, Please Email Me At porgmods@gmail.com.**

# As Of 1.0, Here Are The Foods.
![1.0 Foods](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/iNagHNGe/images/6027382cb36e2026dda66a846ed956c3a386d1e9_350.webp)
# To Install
Forge Was Used To Make This Mod So To Work Use Forge If You're On The Website And Installing It. The Modrinth App Should Auto Install It To Forge.
Enjoy The Mod!
